entry.title: Why i can insert records into standart table?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

I've created an z program and try to add values into mara table.

Why values are adding without 'commit work' statement?

Is it should work like that?

data : ls_line type mara.
ls_line-matnr = '0000-00000-00000'.
insert into mara VALUES ls_line.

 Does 'commit work' starts only updates parts or it should be here too?

entry.title: Why db hints doesn't work?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why hints doesn't work? It's just ignored.
i've created a simple program and try to use ' %_hints db2 '&max_in_blocking_factor 100&', 
but it;s just ignored.

 

data : lt_tab type table of mara,
       lt_Tab2 type SORTED TABLE OF makt WITH UNIQUE key matnr spras.

select * from mara into CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_tab.

select * from makt APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_tab2
  FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_tab
  where matnr = lt_tab-matnr
  and   spras = 'E'
  %_hints db2 '&max_in_blocking_factor 100&'.

 

As i understood 'FOR ALL ENTRIES' takes for 30 records and when i try to set more it's just ignored.

entry.title: I have a issues reagrding the VAS KIT to stock in EWM- ERROR WHILE GENERATING OR UPDATING DELIVERY
entry.content:
Hello Guru, 

I am currently facing issue with regarding with VAS KIT to stock, as per the below screenshot- Document not created and error while creating or updating the delivery. 

I have configured WPT for KTSI and I have assinged the document type to WPT, 

I have created the VAS Bin and assinged the bin to VAS work center

2 packspec created one with KITS pack grp and the other one with my Packspec 

also updated VAS relevance for KITS. 

Could you please help what I may be missing still?

entry.title: Search Strategies
entry.content:
1. What are the most effective online platforms for finding SAP freelance jobs?

2. How can I leverage social media to find SAP freelance opportunities?

3. What SAP-specific job boards should I utilize?

4. How can I network with potential SAP clients?

5. What keywords should I use for SAP freelance job searches?

entry.title: Freelance Requirements
entry.content:
1. What SAP certifications are in highest demand for freelance work?

2. What level of experience is typically required for SAP freelance jobs?

3. What technical skills are essential for SAP freelance consultants?

4. How important is industry-specific knowledge for SAP freelance work?

5. What soft skills are necessary for success as an SAP freelancer?

entry.title: Freelance Criteria
entry.content:
1. What factors should I consider when evaluating SAP freelance job opportunities?

2. How do I determine fair pricing for SAP freelance services?

3. What are the key performance indicators (KPIs) for SAP freelance projects?

4. How can I ensure client satisfaction as an SAP freelancer?

5. What are the benefits and drawbacks of long-term SAP freelance contracts?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello,
 I’m eager to join the SAP Digital Skills Initiative. Currently, I’m working as a junior SAP MM consultant with a background in software development and construction engineering. I’m passionate about expanding my SAP expertise and working toward certification. However, I currently lack the financial means to afford a certification attempt, which is why this initiative is so important to me. I believe my technical skills and determination make me a strong fit for the program. Looking forward to learning with the community!
Best regards,
Ahmed Tarek

entry.title: Re: Sap System Entry Properties
entry.content:
Hi,

 

for SAP Partners there is the SAP learning hub. With different systems provided where you can enroll.

Have a look on: https://learninghub.sap.com/.

 

In general the idea is to take the quality or sandbox system for testing purpose. So your client should have such a system type.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Freelance Management and job market
entry.content:
Freelance Management:*

1. How can I manage multiple SAP freelance projects simultaneously?

2. What tools are essential for SAP freelance project management?

3. How do I handle conflicting client demands?

4. What strategies can I use to maintain work-life balance as an SAP freelancer?

5. How can I scale my SAP freelance business?

*SAP Freelance Market:

1. What are the current trends in the SAP freelance market?

2. Which industries have the highest demand for SAP freelance services?

3. What are the most in-demand SAP modules for freelance work?

4. How can I stay up-to-date with SAP technology advancements?

5. What are the benefits of specializing in a specific SAP area?

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Why db hints doesn't work?
entry.content: There's no evidence in your question that ABAP should consider your hint. Why do you think it should consider it? Are you just expecting from FAE that it would always improve the performance. That's wrong, you can't know. By default, consider that a join is better. FAE may be really slow sometimes, especially for big volumes. You should always analyze what's best for performance.

entry.title: Re: Text alignment problems with text widgets (Update?)
entry.content: Hi Alexander, It’s possible that a recent update may have changed the spike text alignment behavior in the text widgets of SAP Analytics Cloud. I recommend checking the widget’s alignment settings to see if any new options were introduced. You can also review the release notes or updates section for recent changes that could have impacted the layout. If the issue persists, it might be worth reaching out to SAP support or checking the community for others experiencing similar problems. Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Why db hints doesn't work?
entry.content:
Hi ,

You can run an EXPLAIN on your query:

sql
Copy code
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM makt
APPENDING CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE lt_tab2
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_tab
WHERE matnr = lt_tab-matnr
AND spras = 'E'
%_hints db2 '&max_in_blocking_factor 100&'.


This will provide you with details on how DB2 plans to execute your query, allowing you to see if your hint is being utilized.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: How do we create a variable on WEBI that calculates if the patients do the same labs within 60 d
entry.content: To create a variable in Web Intelligence (WebI) that calculates whether patients did the same labs within 60 days, follow these steps: Step 1: Create a Variable to Calculate the Difference in Days Create a variable to calculate the number of days between two lab tests. Use the DaysBetween function. Example formula: plaintext Copy code =DaysBetween([Lab Performed DateTime]; Previous([Lab Performed DateTime])) This will calculate the number of days between the current lab test and the previous one for each patient. Step 2: Filter the Labs Within 60 Days Create another variable to flag the lab tests that occurred within 60 days. Example formula: plaintext Copy code =If([Days Between] <= 60) Then "Within 60 Days" Else "More than 60 Days" Step 3: Calculate the Number of Patients Create a variable to count the number of patients who did labs within 60 days. Use the Count function. Example: plaintext Copy code =Count([Patient ID] Where ([Days Between] <= 60)) This should give you the number of patients who performed the same lab test within 60 days. You can adjust this further based on your data structure. Let me know if you need more details!

entry.title: DIGI FINANCE LOAN APP CUSTOMER CARE HELPLINE NUMBER+91)// 8585057116 ..
entry.content: DIGI FINANCE LOAN APP CUSTOMER CARE HELPLINE NUMBER+91)// 8585057116 ..

entry.title: Gdh the first to comment on the same as the
entry.content: Jf the first to use the first to comment on the
